title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech hosted a livestream demonstrating how to use the Agent Development Kit to build an AI agent capable of playing and solving a text adventure game. The session featured practical coding examples with speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream demonstrates building an AI agent with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) that plays and solves a text adventure game. Speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar walk through practical coding examples, touching on agent orchestration. The text adventure serves as a concrete testbed for agent behavior, showing how ADK structures an agent that reads game state and acts toward a goal.
